_doc: Cells the coverage matrix should show as N/A (not_expected) instead of 'missing': partitions whose report genuinely does NOT disclose a given statement (verified against the PDF — never used to hide an extraction gap for data that IS printed). statement='*' = every NON-CORE lane this partition is missing (core BS/PL/cross always stay flagged); statement may also be a single key or a LIST of keys. period and kind default to '*' (wildcard = every quarter / both consolidation bases) — use them for a bank that STRUCTURALLY never files a lane, so it doesn't need a fresh entry each quarter. Entries are applied only when the cell is otherwise 'missing'.

not_disclosed.note: İşbank interim BRSA report states no headline branch/personnel count (Section-I is history only; note VIII is BS tables). Its ~1,100 branches / ~24k staff are disclosed in the annual faaliyet report, not these financials.
Aktifbank interim report states no headline branch/personnel count in Section-I or note VIII prose (verified 2026Q1; never a profile row in any quarter).
Arap Türk Bankası interim report states no headline branch/personnel count (verified 2026Q1; never a profile row in any quarter).
Türk Eximbank buries '25 branches / 7 liaison offices' deep in note VIII (p83), not in the Section-I intro the extractor scans; no headline personnel count. Policy bank.
TSKB (investment bank) states no headline branch/personnel count; the unconsolidated interim filing is a 14-page brief stub (already covered by the '*' entry below for 2026Q1).

Takasbank (central clearing/settlement bank, CCP — peer-excluded) operates HQ-only with no branches and states no headline personnel count in its interim BRSA report (Section-I is history/board only). Never a profile row in any quarter.
14-page brief interim filing — none of the §4/footnote tables are disclosed
9-page brief consolidated filing — no §4/footnote tables (no capital/liquidity/etc. terms in the PDF)
